name: Google Maps Places Search
description: Search Google Maps for places matching a query and extract the top result cards plus a viewport screenshot of the map.

browser_automation.description: Hits google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=... and reads the place result rail (div.Nv2PK cards).

sequences.name: google_maps_search_extract
sequences.description: Run a Maps places search, extract the top 5 result cards, and capture a screenshot of the map with pins.

required_variables.name: query
required_variables.description: Place search query, e.g. 'pizza near Central Park', 'coffee shops in Berlin'. Aliases: search_query, q.

help.summary: Search Google Maps for places and return the top 5 cards plus a map screenshot.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Place search query, free text. Aliases search_query and q work too.

examples.command: rzn-browser run google maps --param query="pizza near Central Park"
examples.description: Find pizza spots near Central Park.

examples.command: rzn-browser run google maps --param search_query="coffee shops in Berlin Mitte"
examples.description: Use the search_query alias with a neighborhood scope.

help.returns: Array of up to 5 places: { name, rating, reviews, price_range, category, address, description, status, url }. Screenshot is written to test-results/workflow-artifacts/google-maps/. For directions between two places, use google/maps-directions instead.
notes: Set hl=en in the URL — without an explicit locale, results vary with Maps' geo guess.
rating/reviews can be empty for places without enough reviews.
url points at the Maps place page (google.com/maps/place/...), not the place's own website.
